caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman with red hair and a blue patterned top is attentively listening, while on the right, an older man with white hair, glasses, and a beard is speaking. He seems to be reciting or discussing the poems, as indicated by his expressive hand gestures and focused demeanor. The background of the woman's side includes green string lights, adding a cozy ambiance, while the man's background features a blue wall with framed pictures and an "OPEN" sign, suggesting a more formal setting. The overall tone of the video suggests a serious and thoughtful dialogue about the pressing issue of climate change.
